prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation for nitrobenzene using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase was completed. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP. The key result value for the most electrophilic site is approximately 0.47044 (unitless index or property depending on the context). No warnings were reported during this computation.
